no: Jimfix by banananaut. Collection of spell fixes and QoL tweaks. Several components require SCS and/or Ascension. POST-TACTICAL category is correct — these fix/adjust SCS behavior after it installs. cn:1 is ToBEx-only (EE incompatible).

conflicts.reason: Jimfix does not work for IWD spells
cdtweaks Spellcraft makes Jimfix spell school notifications somewhat redundant

dependencies.reason: Buff expiration notifications enhanced by SCS spell system — works without, better with

sum: A small collection of tweaks and fixes for BG2

co.no: DEPRECATED by mod author. Fixes Sunfire power level for dispel checks. Safe standalone fix. No requirements.
DEPRECATED by mod author. EE INCOMPATIBLE — requires ToBEx (non-EE only). Will auto-skip on EE/EET.

co.n: Shield of Reflection works on SCS Flame Arrows
co.tp2n: Shield of Reflection works on SCS Flame Arrows
co.no: Requires SCS cn:5900 (Flame Arrow). Fixes Shield of Reflection to deflect SCS Flame Arrow missiles.
DEPRECATED by mod author. Requires SCS Ascension Abazigal component (dw#ascension_abazigal.mrk). Fixes Smarter Abazigal AI. Only if using SCS+Ascension together.

co.n: Fix Smarter Irenicus at the Throne
co.tp2n: Fix Smarter Irenicus at the Throne
co.no: DEPRECATED by mod author. Requires SCS Ascension Irenicus/Sendai component (dw#ascension_sendai_irenicus.mrk). Only if using SCS+Ascension together.

co.n: Remove Entourage from Ascension Fallen Solars
co.tp2n: Remove entourage from Ascension Fallen Solars
co.no: DEPRECATED by mod author. Requires Ascension Fallen Solars (dw#celestial.mrk). Removes summoned allies from Ascension Fallen Solars to reduce encounter clutter.

co.n: Check for and Fix Incorrect Spell Animations
co.tp2n: Check for and fix incorrect spell animations
co.no: Scans ALL spell files and fixes incorrect animation references. Safe cleanup — no conflicts. Should install after all spell mods.
DEPRECATED by mod author. Forces prebuff spells to show casting animations. Anti-cheese: prevents invisible prebuffing. Patches SCS dwsw*.spl files.

co.tp2n: All spells with a casting time greater than 1
co.scn: Add spell school notifications to the combat log
co.no: Shows spell school in combat log when casting time > 1. Useful for counterspelling. Choose one threshold.

co.tp2n: All spells with a casting time greater than 2
co.scn: Add spell school notifications to the combat log
co.no: Adds spell school text to combat log for spells with casting time > 2

co.tp2n: All spells with a casting time greater than 3
co.scn: Add spell school notifications to the combat log
co.no: Adds spell school text to combat log for spells with casting time > 3

co.tp2n: All spells with a casting time greater than 4
co.scn: Add spell school notifications to the combat log
co.no: Adds spell school text to combat log for spells with casting time > 4

co.tp2n: All spells with a casting time greater than 5
co.scn: Add spell school notifications to the combat log
co.no: Adds spell school text to combat log for spells with casting time > 5
Shows combat log message when buff spells expire. QoL — know when Protection from Evil drops.

co.n: Add Expiration Notifications for Item Buffs
co.tp2n: Add expiration notifications for item buffs
co.no: Shows combat log message when item-based buff effects expire (e.g. potions, item abilities).
Makes all hidden/secret doors visible on the map. Major QoL convenience. Some consider this cheating.

co.n: Allow Spell Shield to Block Wish Breach and Mordenkainen Disjunction
co.tp2n: Allow Spell Shield to block Wish Breach and Mordenkainen's Disjunction
co.no: Expands Spell Shield to also block Wish Breach and Mordenkainen's Disjunction. Requires SCS (DW#WISH1.SPL). Power boost for mages.
